core_mechanism: Bayesian inference of an upper bound on an unknown parameter that enters a wave's dispersion relation (a mass term making propagation speed frequency-dependent), inferred from the shape of the spatial two-point cross-correlation function of a stochastic field sampled by a distributed array of detectors
brief_reason: The abstract models a modified dispersion relation and its resulting tensor angular-correlation function, then performs Bayesian inference on the array's angular-correlation measurements to place credible upper limits, with the constraint driven by the quadrupolar cross-correlation.
